sources.purpose: Main capability library for instruction capabilities, prerequisites, unsuitable scenarios, common errors, and handling suggestions.
High-priority core instruction subset used before broader extended instruction matching.
Maps customer wording to standard requirement types and candidate instruction keys.
Small demand-to-instruction examples for scenario mapping, risks, clarification questions, and regression tests.

sources.original_filename: 影刀常见流程指令链模板V3_逻辑结构版.md
sources.purpose: Checks whether a mature flow-chain pattern exists without generating detailed process breakdown in module 3.
Maps needs to broad scenario families such as web automation, Excel processing, file handling, login, collection, and notification.
Constrains response shape after a decision; not used as capability evidence.

sources.original_filename: 验证码问题及对应指令汇总表.xlsx
sources.purpose: Treats captcha as a conditional capability item and checks captcha type, adapted instructions, cost, accuracy, human fallback, and compliance before marking human verification as a blocker.
